do_not_merge.reason: Contradiction test: borough differs between Bronx and Brooklyn. Community boards are defined by borough, which is a strong identity field per the merge canon. Even though entity_name and entity_type match, the records represent distinct community boards in different boroughs.
Contradiction test: borough differs between Bronx and Manhattan. Same reasoning as above.
Contradiction test: borough differs between Brooklyn and Manhattan. Same reasoning.

suggestion.rationale: All three records share entity_name 'Community Board 4' and entity_type 'community board', but each description indicates a different borough (Bronx, Brooklyn, Manhattan). Per the identity merge canon contradiction test, borough is a strong identity field; differing boroughs force do_not_merge regardless of shared name. No lifecycle or variant relationship exists; each record represents a distinct durable community board entity.
